items.title: Police seize 3.6 kg of ganja in Villupuram, two held
items.summary: The police said initial inquiry revealed the duo had bought ganja from drug peddlers to sell it to individuals in Villupuram district
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
items.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the outset of the US-Israel war with Iran.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Exhausted by Iran War, Tehran Transforms for Khamenei’s Funeral
items.summary: Throughout the capital, the government is using Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s funeral to project strength at a time of great uncertainty for Iran.
